name: (Set of 2) 18" x 24" Naive Floral Sketch Framed Wall Arts Blue - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Add a rustic, chic vibe to your room with the (Set of 2) 18" x 24" Naive Floral Sketch Framed Wall Arts Blue from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. A set of beautiful wall arts, it features delicate flowers against a muted background. A visual treat indeed, use these naive floral sketch wall arts to express your style and spruce up your home decor.
